Data Theme.comment: Psychology, wellness could fit as well here

Method of Making.comment: The hands might have been made with 3D, but I think the graphic design / vector graphic direction is more dominant.

visualElements.description: Bar Mark with colors gradients and foam-like material (excluding hands)

contextualAttributes.comment: The color gradient is used to provide the context of warmth of the hug.

The bar is compressed, showing the hug concept and also a soft cushion-like material. 
The level of compression could be eventually used to encode data (such length of holding or pleasure) but it is not the case here.
The material has a texture that looks a bit like foam.

visualElements.comment: The gripping of the hands is quite subtle.

visualChannels.comment:
The hands are progressively closing, mapped to the duration / intensity of the hug.
Emphasizing the holding time -- but it's very subtle here. it reinforces the mapping with the data but in a very rough way.

contextualAttributes.comment:
Hands are used as a symbolic reference to the hug.
Realistic hand shape
